# ggaction

ggaction is a JavaScript chart-authoring library built around immutable,
hierarchical actions. Use this file as a routing index. The linked Markdown
pages are canonical; the generated full-text bundle is available at
./llms-full.txt.

## Start

- Documentation overview: ./index.md
- Runnable repository setup: ./getting-started.md
- Chart recipes: ./recipes/index.md
- Complete public action reference: ./reference/actions.md
- Supported features and limitations: ./supported-features.md
- Inference and layout troubleshooting: ./troubleshooting.md

## Public API layers

- Chart authoring: ./reference/actions.md#chart-authoring-api
- Advanced chart actions: ./reference/actions.md#advanced-chart-api
- Extension action authoring: ./extension/action-authoring.md
- Primitive extension API: ./extension/primitives.md
- Browser and PNG rendering: ./api/rendering.md

Only methods declared on the public ChartProgram TypeScript type are supported
direct-call actions. Additional wrapped names may appear in action traces but
are internal operations.

## Chart recipes and tutorials

- Scatterplot: ./recipes/scatterplot.md | ./tutorials/scatterplot.md
- Line chart: ./recipes/line-chart.md | ./tutorials/line-chart.md
- Histogram: ./recipes/histogram.md | ./tutorials/histogram.md
- Bar chart: ./recipes/bar-chart.md | ./tutorials/grouped-bar.md
- Regression scatterplot: ./recipes/regression-scatterplot.md | ./tutorials/regression-scatterplot.md
- Density area: ./recipes/density-area.md | ./tutorials/density-area.md

## Core concepts

- Immutable ChartProgram: ./concepts/chart-program.md
- Semantic and graphical state: ./concepts/semantic-and-graphics.md
- Hierarchical action traces: ./concepts/actions-and-trace.md

## Essential invariants

- Every action accepts one option object and returns a new ChartProgram.
- Existing programs and caller-owned inputs are never mutated.
- semanticSpec records chart meaning.
- graphicSpec stores fully materialized backend-neutral graphics.
- There is no automatic semantic-to-graphic compiler.
- Domain actions explicitly invoke graphical materialization.
- Renderers read graphicSpec only.
- Omitted values are resolved as explicit option, unique inference, documented
  default, then an error when no safe choice exists.

## Current scope

The development build supports Cartesian scatterplots, temporal mean line
charts, stacked histograms, ordinal grouped bars, grouped linear, polynomial,
or LOESS regression scatterplots with optional mean/prediction bands, and grouped density areas.
Cartesian guides support bottom/top x axes, left/right y axes, and closed
numeric or UTC label-format tokens.
It renders through browser Canvas and Node PNG. It is not published to npm yet.

Do not assume facets, program composition, SVG rendering, animation, automatic
semantic compilation, or complete Polar chart rendering are implemented.
